messages.content: What are the types of leaves available?

{"intent": "leave_types", "title": "Types of Leaves Available at NMIMS", "subtitle": null, "sections": [{"heading": "Leave Types", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Annual Leave [1]", "Academic Leave (Conference/FDP) [1]", "Sabbatical Leave (6-12 months, after 7 years) [1, 4]", "Leave Without Pay (LWP) [1, 3]", "Special Leave (Marriage/Bereavement) [1, 2]", "Election Duty Leave [2]", "Court Summons Leave [2]", "Blood Donation Leave [2]", "Medical Leave [3]"]}, {"heading": "Specific Details", "type": "bullets", "items": ["Marriage Leave: 3 days paid leave (once in service, requires marriage invitation) [2]", "Bereavement Leave: 5 days paid leave for immediate family member (requires death certificate) [2]", "LWP: Granted only in exceptional circumstances and impacts gratuity/provident fund [3]", "Study Leave (Long-term): Up to 2 years for Ph.D., without pay initially, bond required post-return [4]"]}], "footer": null, "confidence": "high", "fallback": null}
